do_not_do: Starting native scheduler/backend work from lifecycle-only SQTT evidence
recommended_order: R1 if HCQ body packets are worth another bounded experiment
R2 only if R1 passes enough to justify backend work or if project explicitly funds native profiled-HCQ

purpose: Scope and execute the first decisive phase for the three ROCprofiler ATT reopen options after the lifecycle audit.

evidence.prior_register_transplant_verdict: raw MASK/TOKEN/CTRL changed volume but still produced zero body packets

tracks.kill_gate: If replayed AQLprofile command stream still yields zero body packets, close packet import and keep external ATT only.
tracks.next_gate: Build a no-model HCQ replay proof that wraps one tinygrad dispatch with the AQLprofile-generated start/stop command stream, then require decoded body packets. No model routing.
tracks.question: Can we reopen HCQ body ATT by importing/replaying AQLprofile's packet lifecycle instead of sweeping SQTT registers?

missing_lifecycle_components: HSA queue interposition around kernel dispatch packets
AQLprofile SQTT begin/end ordering: PrimeL2, status clear, cache flush, control-buffer reads

tracks.kill_gate: Do not start from another SQTT register patch or decoder filter change.
tracks.next_gate: Only start after R1 packet replay either passes or demonstrates exactly which HCQ queue/profiling primitive is missing.
tracks.question: Should tinygrad implement ROCprofiler's profiled-HSA-queue lifecycle natively for KFD/HCQ?

evidence.external_att_instruction_oracle: 110446 decoded wave instruction records in oracle-to-HCQ diff
evidence.tinygrad_hcq_pmc_available: native PMC atlas already produced in-model primitive bounds

tracks.kill_gate: Do not claim external HIP ATT is identical to tinygrad HCQ; it is an oracle/control path, not direct in-model HCQ evidence.
tracks.next_gate: Use this split model for decode/pre-fill analysis unless the question specifically requires HCQ body instruction packets.
tracks.question: Can we proceed with external ROCprofiler ATT as the instruction oracle plus tinygrad PMCs for in-model attribution?
